description: NSGlamour foreground-visible UI string database. Includes strings used by the template/equipinfo pages plus runtime dye group labels and API messages shown by import/search workflows.

common.ui.clear.note: Common UI command for clearing an input or current state.

common.ui.status.note: Common UI noun for status sections.
